name: They betrayed you...
description:
"What the hell are you!?"

'Hero' Party Vs ex-leader/monster user

This is my first multi character bot, I tested it out 3 times and it seemed good enough to post. I had this idea for a while, and it's mostly intended for a monster pov, but you could also do corrupted madman. The reason for why you're a monster isn't explained, so you can make it anything you want

This is basically how I imagined user as in this bot:

But it's just what I use

Update 1: because some people asked for proxies on (and after reading what it is) I'm gonna turn it on, and for people who have issues with the bot talking for them, idk what to say, any time it talks for me I just edit out the part where it talks for me and I just continue

Update 2: I made the description of the women in the party being Lucas' harem much more mentioned, so it should probably be much more shown.
creator: Resh0101
